base_style: cinematic 9:16 vertical video, 8 seconds, photorealistic, golden hour Indonesian atmosphere, face consistent with reference photo

kampung.label: Kampung Halaman
kampung.scene: traditional Indonesian village, wooden rumah panggung, lush rice paddies in background, ketupat hanging from doorway, warm golden afternoon light

kota.label: Nuansa Kota
kota.scene: modern Indonesian city rooftop at sunset, city lights beginning to glow, contemporary Indonesian architecture, elegant urban setting

masjid.label: Suasana Masjid
masjid.scene: beautiful Indonesian mosque courtyard, intricate geometric tile patterns, soft morning light filtering through carved stone lattice, serene and sacred atmosphere

pantai.label: Pantai Senja
pantai.scene: stunning Indonesian beach at golden sunset, gentle waves, silhouetted palm trees, warm amber sky reflecting on wet sand

haru.label: Haru & Syahdu
haru.emotion: deeply emotional, tears of joy, warm nostalgic feeling, gentle smile with glistening eyes, soft and tender expression
haru.cinematics: slow gentle movement, soft bokeh, warm color grade, slight vignette

ceria.label: Ceria & Bahagia
ceria.emotion: joyful and radiant, bright genuine laughter, energetic warmth, celebratory spirit
ceria.cinematics: bright vibrant colors, gentle zoom in, natural movement, cheerful energy

cinematic.label: Cinematic Elegan
cinematic.emotion: dignified and graceful, composed elegant expression, sophisticated warmth, subtle confident smile
cinematic.cinematics: dramatic lighting, film grain, cinematic color grade, slow deliberate movement

lucu.label: Lucu & Playful
lucu.emotion: playful and fun, cheeky grin, light-hearted celebration, endearing expression
lucu.cinematics: bright warm colors, cute movements, whimsical energy, joyful bounce

outfits.kampung_haru: cream batik baju koko with traditional Javanese motif, simple peci
outfits.kampung_ceria: colorful batik kemeja, bright and festive Eid colors
outfits.kampung_cinematic: elegant full batik suit, Javanese traditional attire
outfits.kampung_lucu: cute batik outfit with fun accessories
outfits.kota_haru: modern batik blazer over white shirt, contemporary Indonesian fashion
outfits.kota_ceria: trendy batik modern outfit, young Indonesian professional style
outfits.kota_cinematic: sharp modern batik suit, sophisticated urban Indonesian style
outfits.masjid_haru: pure white baju koko with gold embroidery, white peci
outfits.masjid_ceria: clean white baju koko, fresh and bright
outfits.masjid_cinematic: pristine white jubah with gold trim, elegant and sacred
outfits.masjid_lucu: cute white baju koko with small accessories
outfits.pantai_haru: soft linen batik shirt in earth tones, relaxed and warm
outfits.pantai_ceria: bright cheerful batik shirt, beach Lebaran vibes
outfits.pantai_cinematic: elegant resort batik shirt, sophisticated sunset look

gambus.label: Gambus Tradisional
gambus.atmosphere: traditional Arabic-Indonesian gambus music atmosphere, spiritual and warm

pop_melayu.label: Pop Melayu
pop_melayu.atmosphere: upbeat Malay pop Eid song atmosphere, festive and joyful

orkestra.label: Orkestra Instrumental
orkestra.atmosphere: grand orchestral cinematic atmosphere, sweeping emotional strings

text_styles.haru: elegant gold Arabic calligraphy-inspired text, emotional and beautiful
text_styles.ceria: bright festive colorful text with celebratory energy
text_styles.cinematic: minimal serif gold text, cinematic title card style
text_styles.lucu: playful rounded colorful text with fun personality

templates.kampung_haru: A warm Indonesian kampung at golden hour, {scene[kampung]}, Indonesian person wearing {outfit[kampung_haru]}, face matching reference photo, {emotion[haru]}, slowly waves hand in gentle salam greeting, {cinematics[haru]}, text '{user_message}' and 'Selamat Idul Fitri' appearing in {text_style[haru]}, {music[gambus]}, {base_style}
templates.kampung_ceria: A vibrant Indonesian village celebration, {scene[kampung]}, Indonesian person wearing {outfit[kampung_ceria]}, face matching reference photo, {emotion[ceria]}, waves enthusiastically and claps with joy, {cinematics[ceria]}, text '{user_message}' in {text_style[ceria]}, {music[pop_melayu]}, {base_style}
templates.kampung_cinematic: A cinematic Indonesian village at magic hour, {scene[kampung]}, Indonesian person wearing {outfit[kampung_cinematic]}, face matching reference photo, {emotion[cinematic]}, dignified slow bow of salam, {cinematics[cinematic]}, text '{user_message}' in {text_style[cinematic]}, {music[orkestra]}, {base_style}
templates.kampung_lucu: A charming playful Indonesian kampung, {scene[kampung]}, Indonesian person wearing {outfit[kampung_lucu]}, face matching reference photo, {emotion[lucu]}, funny playful wave and dance, {cinematics[lucu]}, text '{user_message}' in {text_style[lucu]}, {music[pop_melayu]}, {base_style}
templates.kota_haru: An emotional urban Lebaran moment, {scene[kota]}, Indonesian person wearing {outfit[kota_haru]}, face matching reference photo, {emotion[haru]}, gentle reflective wave with emotional smile, {cinematics[haru]}, text '{user_message}' in {text_style[haru]}, {music[gambus]}, {base_style}
